sections.paragraph:
Μύρτη, ης, η(IG II 856; 2380 [both IV b.c.]; Aeschyl.) Myrta a Christian in Corinth AcPl Ha 7, 9.—FBechtel, Die Attischen Frauennamen 1902, 102.

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 661
